message:
fix: add auto-migration, zero-division guard, and exactOptionalPropertyTypes hardening

db/connection.ts:
- Add auto-migration for in-memory and DB_AUTO_MIGRATE=1 databases using
  drizzle-orm's migrate(). This ensures test and ephemeral DBs always
  have current schema without manual migration steps.

tokenizer.service.ts:
- Guard against division by zero in truncateToTokens() when currentTokens
  is 0, returning the ellipsis string instead of producing NaN via
  Math.floor(text.length * (targetTokens / 0)).

package.json:
- Update test/test:integration/test:contract scripts to set
  DB_FILE_NAME=:memory: and explicitly scope test directories, ensuring
  tests use in-memory SQLite with auto-migration.

Gateway services & tests (29 files, +575/-354):
- Apply exactOptionalPropertyTypes hardening across services: construct
  response objects with only defined fields instead of spreading
  potentially-undefined values from Zod parse results.
- Affected: agent-detection, approval, conflict-resolution, cost-tracker,
  dashboard, dcg-pending, git, history, reservation, snapshot, tokenizer
  services; conflicts/handoffs routes; test utilities and 11 test files.
- base-driver.ts and gateway-harness.ts updated for consistency.

Beads sync: updated issue tracker status.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -11,11 +11,11 @@
     "dev:gateway": "bun run --filter @flywheel/gateway dev",
     "dev:web": "bun run --filter @flywheel/web dev",
     "build": "bun run --filter '*' build",
-    "test": "bun test",
-    "test:integration": "bun test --filter 'tests/integration/**'",
+    "test": "DB_FILE_NAME=:memory: bun test apps packages tests/contract tests/integration",
+    "test:integration": "DB_FILE_NAME=:memory: bun test tests/integration",
     "test:e2e": "bunx playwright test",
     "e2e:server": "bun scripts/e2e-server.ts",
-    "test:contract": "bun test tests/contract/",
+    "test:contract": "DB_FILE_NAME=:memory: bun test tests/contract",
     "test:load": "k6 run tests/load/api.k6.js",
     "test:load:ws": "k6 run tests/load/websocket.k6.js",
     "lint": "biome check .",
